parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "sql": "INSERT OR REPLACE INTO menu_items (spreadsheet_id, sheet_name, row_id, name, description, price, category, available, data, timestamp) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)",
  "params": [
    "${CLOUDFLARE_DATABASE_ID}",
    $json.sheet_name,
    $json.row_id,
    $json.data.name,
    $json.data.description,
    $json.data.price,
    $json.data.category,
    $json.data.available,
    $json.raw_data,
    $json.timestamp
  ]
}
